sourceTitle: AI & Academic Integrity | Center for Teaching Innovation
evidenceSnippetOriginal: To best support student learning and reduce violations of academic integrity, be sure to clearly communicate your policies regarding the use of generative AI in your syllabus, in assignment instructions, and verbally in class.
evidenceLocator: Opening paragraph of AI & Academic Integrity page
